title: maranthes polyandra subsp. floribunda
intro: Maranthes polyandra subsp. floribunda is a plant species commonly found in tropical Africa, also known as a type of flowering plant in the family Chrysobalanaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Maranthes polyandra subsp. floribunda include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as possessing anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
